Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Loretta Majera. Plaintiff, Ohene Boakye-Yiadom is sworn and examined. Plaintiff appealed to the lst District Court of Appeals for review of the clerk's denial of entry of judgment. The request was denied. Based on evidence received, the Court finds that proof of service in regards to both Defendants, City & County of San Francisco and State of California is defective in that they were not personally served. Request for entry of default denied.
